v.description: Simple help and sanity checks for Node CLI bin scripts

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project's GitHub Action workflows avoid dangerous patterns.

checks.name: Binary-Artifacts

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project has generated executable (binary) artifacts in the source repository.

checks.reason: no binaries found in the repo

checks.name: Code-Review

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project requires human code review before pull requests (aka merge requests) are merged.

checks.reason: Found 0/30 approved changesets -- score normalized to 0

checks.name: Maintained

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project is "actively maintained".

checks.reason: 0 commit(s) and 0 issue activity found in the last 90 days -- score normalized to 0

checks.name: Packaging

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project is published as a package that others can easily download, install, easily update, and uninstall.

details: Warn: no GitHub/GitLab publishing workflow detected.

checks.name: Token-Permissions

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project's workflows follow the principle of least privilege.

checks.reason: detected GitHub workflow tokens with excessive permissions
details: Info: no jobLevel write permissions found

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project has declared and pinned the dependencies of its build process.
